name: Citrulline Malate
summary: Decision-ready summary: Citrulline Malate is best framed for exercise pump; high-rep performance; blood-flow support; safety screen: hypotension; nitrate/PDE5 medication review.
description: Citrulline Malate supports pump; endurance; blood flow with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: May lower blood pressure; review with nitrates, PDE5 inhibitors, or hypotension.

claimMap.claim: v9.2: Recent acute RCT used 4.4 g pre-workout; earlier performance studies often use higher 6–8 g dosing.
claimMap.notes: v9.2: Recent acute RCT used 4.4 g pre-workout; earlier performance studies often use higher 6–8 g dosing.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 4.4–8 g acute pre-workout citrulline malate, depending on study and product ratio
